overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny Los Santos neighborhood. The journey begins on a palm-lined residential sidewalk, crosses an intersection, and continues up a steep hill toward a commercial area with the iconic Burger Shot sign visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk lined with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past residential buildings and palm trees

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving down the street

entered.detail: tall palm tree trunk with textured bark in foreground
light-colored multi-story residential building with balconies
beige apartment building with external staircases and balconies
black garbage bins lined up against the wall
tall modern skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit residential sidewalk lined with palm trees and apartment buildings. Black trash bins sit against a wall on the right while cars occasionally pass on the left. The downtown skyline is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with cylindrical traffic control building

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection
turning left to proceed up the steep hill

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left to head up the hill

entered.detail: rounded modern building with large glass windows at the corner
traffic signal pole at the intersection
two-story house with orange facade behind the fence

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing an urban intersection featuring a distinctive cylindrical glass building at the corner. The camera turns left after crossing, leaving the palm-lined street behind and heading toward a steep uphill sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep uphill sidewalk approaching commercial district

events.description: beginning steep ascent up the hill
box truck with 'DEALS & DOLLARS' text driving up the hill

agents.ego_description: walking up the steep sidewalk with the Burger Shot sign visible ahead on the left

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the street
person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: large rotating burger balloon sign on top of building
concrete block wall running alongside the uphill sidewalk
tall art deco style building with the burger sign
contemporary building with orange window awnings

segments.scene_description: Ascending a steep sidewalk with a concrete retaining wall on the right. The iconic Burger Shot sign becomes prominent on the left, mounted on a tall art deco building. Various vehicles including a box truck and black SUV pass by on the street. The area transitions to a more commercial district with modern buildings, and a pedestrian is visible walking ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a palm-lined residential neighborhood toward a steep, commercial hillside district. It begins by moving along a sunlit sidewalk past apartment buildings and black trash bins, with the distant downtown skyline framing the horizon. As the camera approaches and crosses an urban intersection marked by a cylindrical glass building, it turns left and leaves the residential greenery behind. The scene then shifts to a steep ascent up a concrete sidewalk, where the environment transitions into a commercial zone featuring a prominent Burger Shot sign on an art deco building. Finally, the camera climbs past passing vehicles and a distant pedestrian, moving deeper into the modern urban landscape.
